name: Hot Air Balloon
notes: Cheap high-splash ground bomber; cannot target Air. Strong against buildings. Slow and hits harder per shot than Tinder Box's Flamecopter (same splash radius, same ground-only targeting) — the deliberate slow/heavy-hitting counterpart to Flamecopter's fast/lower-damage/Wood-specialist profile, see data/troops/flamecopter.json. Fuel upkeep is modest — lighter than most aircraft, which normally carry heavy Fuel consumption. empImmune: a hot-air envelope has no engine for Signal Ridge's EMP Turret to disable, unlike every other Air-domain unit (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md's Status Effects section).
